prompt: Create an Excel budget spreadsheet with monthly columns (Jan-Dec), rows for Income, Rent, Utilities, Food, Transport, Entertainment, and a Total Expenses row with SUM formulas. Include a Savings row that calculates Income minus Total Expenses.
expectations: Uses openpyxl to create the spreadsheet
Includes SUM formulas for Total Expenses (not hardcoded values)
Includes a Savings formula (Income - Total Expenses)
Applies financial model color coding (blue for inputs, black for formulas)
Runs LibreOffice recalc to verify formula values
